_description: Department fallback keyword 查表 — 把 real_dept_v4 (reclassify_and_rebuild.py) + derive_dept (derive_metadata.py) 兩支 if/elif 整成 7 層 cascade。
_consumer: scripts/core/reclassify_and_rebuild.py:real_dept_v4() — 整支砍掉, 改 import resolve_dept(rec) 走本表
_enum_change_note: 從 v1 多 enum (Active/Sleepwear/Swimwear/Fleece/Collaboration/RTW/MATERNITY/UNKNOWN) 收斂到 v2 6 個: (1) COLLABORATION → 併 ACTIVE; (2) MATERNITY → 拔出 Dept, 放 GENDER 維度 (resolve_gender override 已支援); (3) 統一 UPPERCASE

_priority_cascade.source: 本表 (注: COLLABORATION 併 ACTIVE)

by_item._priority: SWIM 優先 (排除 RASHGUARD), 再 SLEEP, 其他不命中

by_category._note: KNITS/WOVEN 是 fabric 訊號不是 dept, 不在本表回值, 讓 cascade 往下走

by_collab_set._description: 原 real_dept_v4 把 NFL/NBA/MISCSPORTS 設 Collaboration, v2 收斂 enum 改併 ACTIVE

ACTIVE._note: WAC=Women Active, FR=Fashion Ready, 24 tokens 從 derive_dept 段3 + real_dept_v4 step3 合併

RTW._note: 原邏輯 'KNIT and not FR' → RTW 太鬆, 拔掉。WOVEN/FASHION/DRESSY 才回 RTW

SWIMWEAR._swim_special_logic: 原 real_dept_v4: SWIM in dept_raw → 看 item_type 在 active_types 內 → ACTIVE; 否則 SWIMWEAR。本表保留 active_types 給 runner 用

by_client_default._description: 原 real_dept_v4 step3 客戶特定 + derive_dept 段4 客戶特定 合併

_kids_default_logic.match: client UPPER 含任一 [KIDS, BOY, GIRL, BABY] 且其他 tier 都不命中
_kids_default_logic._note: KIDS/BOY/GIRL/BABY client 沒明確 dept 字眼時默認 RTW

_dicks_golf_override.match: client == 'DICKS' 且 (program / subgroup) 含 WALTER HAGEN 或 GOLF
_dicks_golf_override._note: 高爾夫 dressy pants 是 RTW 不是 ACTIVE

_removed_from_enum_v2.COLLABORATION: 併 ACTIVE — NFL/NBA/MISCSPORTS 本質是 active wear + 授權通路差異是 trim 層不是 dept
_removed_from_enum_v2.MATERNITY: 拔出 Dept, 放 GENDER 維度 — real_dept_v4 註解早就堅持的: Maternity is a GENDER, not a Department. resolve_gender override 已支援
_removed_from_enum_v2.UNKNOWN: 保留為 cascade fallback 終點, 不入 canonical enum
